name: GH_RuntimeFile
summary: Runtime representation of a Grasshopper help file. A GH_RuntimeFile is nothing more than a collection of keywords with associated content. This class does not interpret a file or check its validity, it merely figures out the different content section based on "Keyword:" entries.

methods.name: ContainsKey
methods.summary: Test whether a certain key is present in the File.

returns.doc: True if the key is present in the file, false if not.

methods.name: IsTag
methods.summary: Tests whether a string is a predefined Grasshopper Help keyword.

params.name: text
params.doc: String to test. Should contain no whitespace, but does not need to properly cased.

returns.doc: True if text is a predefined keyword, false if not.

methods.name: IsTagLine
methods.signature: public static bool IsTagLine(string line, out string keyword, out string remainder)
methods.summary: Tests whether a line of text starts with a Grasshopper Help keyword.

params.name: keyword
params.doc: This is where the keyword is returned.

params.name: remainder
params.doc: This is where the non-keyword part of the line is returned.

returns.doc: True if the line starts with a keyword.

methods.name: ParseFile
methods.summary: Parse a file and return the runtime representation of said file.

returns.doc: The runtime representation of the file on the disk.

properties.name: Content
properties.summary: Gets the data associated with a certain key. For every time the key appears in the file, an array of content strings will be returned.

properties.name: Keys
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the keys present in the File.

properties.name: Path
properties.summary: Gets the path of this help file.

properties.name: Tags
properties.summary: Gets a collection of all the pre-defined keywords. Use IsKeyword(string) if you want to know whether a string equals a keyword. It's both faster and more reliable than comparing against this collection.

properties.name: TagAuthor
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Author fields in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagAutoLink
properties.summary: String tag used to signal whether automatic linking to a topic is allowed.

properties.name: TagBeginner
properties.summary: String tag used t o identify Beginner Level Help Content in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagCategory
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Category fields in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagComponent
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Component IDs in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagContact
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Author contact details in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagDescription
properties.summary: String tag used t o identify Description fields in glossary source files.

properties.name: TagErranyms
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Do Not Confuse collections in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagExpert
properties.summary: String tag used t o identify Expert Level Help Content in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagInclude
properties.summary: String tag used to signal whether inclusion of a topic is allowed.

properties.name: TagIntermediate
properties.summary: String tag used t o identify Intermediate Level Help Content in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagKeywords
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Keyword collections in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagPronunciation
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Pronunciaion Guide fields (IPA) in glossary source files.

properties.name: TagRhinoCommand
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Similar Rhino Commands in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagSeeAlso
properties.summary: String tag used to identify See Also collections in documentation source files.

properties.name: TagSynonyms
properties.summary: String tag used to identify Synonym collections in glossary source files.

properties.name: TagTitle
properties.summary: String tag used to identify title fields in documentation source files.
